pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Amazon EC2 Simple Systems Manager (SSM) enables you to configure and manage your EC2 instances. You can create a configuration document and then associate it with one or more running instances.
/See:/ <http://docs.aws.amazon.com/ssm/latest/APIReference/Welcome.html AWS API Reference>
/Warning:/ This is an experimental preview release which is still under heavy development and not intended for public consumption, caveat emptor!
